title: Extra Enchants
description: Extra Enchant is a Minecraft mod that adds 13 more enchantments, enhancing tools, weapons, and armor with powerful combat abilities, utility, and creative mechanics. Providing players with many more extra enchantments that are overpowered!
body:
# Extra Enchants

## Description
Extra enchants adds many enchantments to your game, making your minecraft experience more fun!

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5f0dfaeb8076451cb324eb550f4bf86c8f7227.png)
![Example enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1d79331a5b515268b42c4919d10c4b258481457.gif)
## Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader 0.16.10** or newer for Minecraft 1.21.1x
2. Place `extra-enchants-v.x.x.jar` in your `mods` folder  
3. Start Minecraft with the Fabric profile
5. **Make sure you have the fabric api mod**

## Enchantments

### Auto Smelter
**Description**: Automatically smelts ores when mined

**Mechanics**: 
* Level 1: 33% chance to smelt
* Level 2: 67% chance to smelt
* Level 3: 100% chance to smelt 

**Compatibility**: All pickaxes

### Frostbite
**Description**: Slows mobs on hit

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Slowness I for 1.5s
* Level 2: Slowness II for 1.5s

**Compatibility**: All axes and swords (incompatible with fire aspect)

### Batch Miner
**Description**: Breaks more stone blocks when mining

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Radius 1
* Level 2: Radius 2
* Level 3: Radius 3
**Compatibility**: All pickaxes

### Wither
**Description**: Gives enemies wither effect on hit

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Wither I for 8s

**Compatibility**: All swords

### Explosive shot
**Description**: Arrow explodes on hit

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Creates a small explosion on hit

**Compatibility**: Bow

### Shadow walker
**Description**: Grants invisibility while sneaking

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Grants invisibility for 5s with cooldown of 60s

**Compatibility**: All boots

### Luck of the sea+
**Description**: Increases fishing luck

**Compatibility**: Fishing rod

### Heavy weight
**Description**: Reduces knockback

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Reduces knockback slightly
* Level 2: Reduces knockback significantly

**Compatibility**: All armor pieces

### Magnetism
**Description**: Increases pickup range for items

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: 5 blocks
* Level 2: 7 blocks
* Level 3: 9 blocks

**Compatibility**: All chestplates
### Night owl
**Description**: Gives night vision when light is low

**Compatibility**: All helmets

### Thunderstrike
**Description**: Strikes lightning on critical hits

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: 7% chance to strike lightning on critical hit
* Level 2: 14% chance to strike lightning on critical hit
* Level 3: 21% chance to strike lightning on critical hit

**Compatibility**: All swords

### Lifesteal
**Description**: Heals the player when hitting enemies

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: 0.5 heart
* Level 2: 1 heart
* Level 3: 1.5 hearts

**Compatibility**: All swords

### Last Stand
**Description**: Grants damage resistance for 3s when health is below 20%

**Mechanics**:
* Level 1: Resistance I
* Level 2: Resistance II

**Compatibility**: All chestplates
